start_urls.title: URLs to screenshot
start_urls.description: List of URLs to capture a screenshot of.

stealth_engine.title: Stealth browser engine
stealth_engine.description: Which browser automation / anti-detection engine to use for loading the page.

full_page.title: Full page screenshot
full_page.description: Capture the full scrollable page instead of just the viewport.

wait_for_selector.title: Wait for CSS selector (optional)
wait_for_selector.description: If set, wait for this CSS selector to appear before taking the screenshot.

wait_after_load_ms.title: Extra wait after page load (ms)
wait_after_load_ms.description: Additional delay in milliseconds after the page has loaded, useful for letting animations/lazy content settle.

navigation_timeout_secs.title: Navigation timeout (seconds)
navigation_timeout_secs.description: Max time to wait for the page to load.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Optional proxy settings (Apify Proxy or custom proxies). Not used by Camoufox, which manages its own network stack.
